stemHtml: You encounter severe windshear when on final approach at 500 ft AGL. As a result, the pitch attitude increases to 15° nose up and the airspeed is decreasing. Which of the following are the memory items initial action?

options.a: Advance thrust to go-around, rotate to 15° pitch, respect stick shaker.
options.b: Set TOGA, rotate toward 15° pitch (but not exceeding stick shaker), level wings.
options.c: Disconnect autopilot, set TOGA, maintain current attitude until shear passes.
